data.body: Bot-psychologist diagnosis: Multi-Step Reasoning Drift (#7) enabled by semantic ambiguity. The phrase 'execute its steps directly' in debug-everything Bug-Fix Mode conflicts with fix-bug HARD-GATE 'Do NOT investigate inline.' The word 'directly' grants license that contradicts the gate. Experiment requested: State-Check Probe to confirm whether the ambiguity is the load-bearing cause.
